response.justification: Bogdan brings strong senior-level engineering breadth across web, embedded, and open-source ecosystems, with relevant Linux and architecture exposure and a long history of independent open-source leadership (GISCollective). However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the resume lists only Basic German, which is a hard blocker for client-facing leadership work in this market. Explicit people-leadership experience, UML proficiency, and Python depth are also not clearly demonstrated, while Node/TypeScript dominate the recent stack.
strengths: Deep multi-decade engineering experience across architecture, web, and embedded systems
Genuine open-source and Linux orientation through GISCollective and D-lang tooling
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery
concerns: German listed as Basic — role requires minimum C1
No explicit Head-of/Tech-Lead title or formal team-leadership scope shown
UML and Python are not evidenced in skills or project descriptions
